sentences.target: Il dérobe mon portefeuille au marché.

translations.fr: Il dérobe mon portefeuille au marché.
translations.en: He steals my wallet at the market.
translations.es: Él me roba la cartera en el mercado.
translations.de: Er stiehlt mir auf dem Markt mein Portemonnaie.
translations.it: Lui mi ruba il portafoglio al mercato.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在市场上偷我的钱包。
translations.yue: 佢喺街市度偷我個銀包。
translations.ru: Он ворует у меня кошелёк на рынке.
translations.pt: Ele rouba minha carteira no mercado.
translations.he: הוא גונב לי את הארנק בשוק.
translations.vi: Anh ấy ăn cắp ví của tôi ở chợ.
translations.nl: Hij steelt mijn portemonnee op de markt.
translations.uk: Він краде мій гаманець на ринку.
translations.hu: Ő ellopja a pénztárcámat a piacon.
translations.hi: वह बाज़ार में मेरा बटुआ चुराता है।
translations.pl: On kradnie mój portfel na targu.
translations.el: Αυτός μου κλέβει το πορτοφόλι στην αγορά.
translations.nb: Han stjeler lommeboken min på markedet.
translations.id: Dia mencuri dompet saya di pasar.
translations.sv: Han stjäl min plånbok på marknaden.
translations.ro: El îmi fură portofelul în piață.
translations.cs: On mi krade peněženku na trhu.
translations.da: Han stjæler min pung på markedet.
translations.ja: 彼は市場で私の財布を盗む。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive verb meaning ‘to steal’, taking a direct object (‘mon portefeuille’).
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies ‘portefeuille’ to mark possession.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of ‘dérobe’.
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with definite article ‘le’ (à + le → au); introduces a locative complement (‘au marché’).
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the prepositional phrase ‘au marché’ indicating location.

translations.de: Du klaust mir immer meine Stifte.
translations.it: Tu mi rubi sempre le penne.
translations.ru: Ты всегда воруешь у меня ручки.
translations.he: אתה תמיד גונב לי את העטים שלי.
translations.vi: Bạn lúc nào cũng lấy trộm bút của tôi.
translations.hi: तुम हमेशा मेरे पेन चुराते हो।
translations.el: Εσύ πάντα μου κλέβεις τα στυλό.
translations.ro: Tu îmi furi mereu pixurile mele.
translations.cs: Ty mi vždycky kradeš moje propisky.
translations.ja: あなたはいつも私のペンを盗む。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; transitive verb taking a direct object (‘mes stylos’).
Adverb of frequency; modifies the verb to indicate habitual action.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, plural form; modifies ‘stylos’ to mark possession.
Common noun (masculine plural); direct object of ‘dérobes’.

sentences.target: Ils dérobent des bonbons à l'épicerie.

translations.fr: Ils dérobent des bonbons à l'épicerie.
translations.en: They steal candies at the grocery store.
translations.es: Ellos roban caramelos en la tienda de comestibles.
translations.it: Loro rubano caramelle al negozio di alimentari.
translations.vi: Họ ăn cắp kẹo ở cửa hàng tạp hóa.
translations.nl: Zij stelen snoep in de kruidenierswinkel.
translations.uk: Вони крадуть цукерки в продуктовому магазині.
translations.hi: वे किराने की दुकान में टॉफियाँ चुराते हैं।
translations.pl: Oni kradną cukierki w sklepie spożywczym.
translations.id: Mereka mencuri permen di toko kelontong.
translations.ro: Ei fură bomboane din magazinul alimentar.
translations.ja: 彼らは食料品店で飴を盗む。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; transitive verb taking a direct object (‘des bonbons’).
Indefinite plural article; introduces a non-specific plural noun (‘bonbons’).
Common noun (masculine plural); direct object of ‘dérobent’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article with elision before a vowel; agrees with ‘épicerie’ (feminine singular).
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition ‘à’, indicating the place of the action.

sentences.target: Elle veut dérober les clés ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɛl vø deʁɔbe le kle sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Elle veut dérober les clés ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɛl vø deʁɔbe le kle sə swaʁ/
translations.en: She wants to steal the keys tonight.
translations.es: Ella quiere robar las llaves esta noche.
translations.de: Sie will heute Abend die Schlüssel stehlen.
translations.it: Lei vuole rubare le chiavi stasera.
translations.ko: 그녀는 오늘 밤 열쇠를 훔치고 싶어 한다.
translations.ru: Она хочет украсть ключи сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Ela quer roubar as chaves esta noite.
translations.he: היא רוצה לגנוב את המפתחות הלילה.
translations.tr: O bu gece anahtarları çalmak istiyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn ăn cắp chìa khóa tối nay.
translations.nl: Zij wil vanavond de sleutels stelen.
translations.uk: Вона хоче вкрасти ключі сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Ő ma este el akarja lopni a kulcsokat.
translations.hi: वह आज रात चाबियाँ चुराना चाहती है।
translations.pl: Ona chce ukraść klucze dziś wieczorem.
translations.el: Αυτή θέλει να κλέψει τα κλειδιά απόψε.
translations.nb: Hun vil stjele nøklene i kveld.
translations.id: Dia ingin mencuri kunci malam ini.
translations.sv: Hon vill stjäla nycklarna i kväll.
translations.ro: Ea vrea să fure cheile în seara asta.
translations.cs: Ona chce dnes večer ukrást klíče.
translations.da: Hun vil stjæle nøglerne i aften.
translations.fi: Hän haluaa varastaa avaimet tänä iltana.
translations.ja: 彼女は今夜鍵を盗みたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes an infinitive complement (‘dérober’).
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of ‘veut’; transitive, will take ‘les clés’ as its direct object.
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun ‘clés’ as a specific set.
Common noun (feminine plural); direct object of the infinitive ‘dérober’.
Demonstrative determiner forming a temporal noun phrase (‘ce soir’) meaning ‘this evening’.
Common noun used as a temporal complement; head of the NP ‘ce soir’.

jp: Il dérobe mon portefeuille au marché.
Ils dérobent des bonbons à l'épicerie.
Elle veut dérober les clés ce soir.

Ils dérobent des bonbons à l'épicerie.
Elle veut dérober les clés ce soir.
ipa: /ɛl vø deʁɔbe le kle sə swaʁ/
en: He steals my wallet at the market.
They steal candies at the grocery store.
She wants to steal the keys tonight.
